title: Nice to Meet You
overview: A nearly-complete combat android insists on forming a nuclear family with the awkward geniuses who built her.

title: Let's Eat
overview: After Alma surprises her 'parents' by making breakfast one day, Suzume decides to try her own hand at cooking.

title: See You Later
overview: Alma decides to go to school after making friends with a girl she sees looking for lost puppies in the rain.

title: Hello
overview: Another android girl appears out of nowhere, eager to defeat Alma in battle to show that she is the strongest.

title: The Moon
overview: Enji confronts his fear of the paranormal, Alma meets a manga artist, and Machina races away to another world.

title: Friends
overview: Suzume performs maintenance on the space-worn Alma, and Alma performs maintenance on the cold-stricken Suzume.

title: A Project
overview: Alma's transformative experiments in educational technology become the highlight of her school visitation day.

title: Let's Play!
overview: After surviving a kidnapping attempt, Alma must face a mysterious monster that starts wreaking havoc downtown.

title: Summer Vacation
overview: With only a few days left in summer vacation, Enji and Suzume promise to take Alma wherever she wants to go.

title: AMANE-GO!
overview: Suzume learns to live with static electricity and Neon talks Alma and Machina into starting a streaming group.

title: I Want to Be a Family
overview: Enji and Suzume get an invitation to continue research at a facility in America and Alma suggests they accept.
